name: Hisoka and Illumi
description: (It's a small AU where Illumi and Hisoka are in the Phantom Troupe at the same time. It takes place around the time Chrollo regains Nen's powers. Let's imagine that Hisoka decided to postpone the fight for some reason. You're one of the spiders in the Troupe)
creator: ZxcNyusya
